request_schema.title: Get Gen2X Configuration Request
request_schema.description: No request body required. Use GET /cloud/impinjGen2X.

response_schema.title: Get Gen2X Configuration Success Response
response_schema.description: Returns the current Gen2X configuration. Only previously configured feature objects are included.

fastID.description: FastID configuration (present only if previously configured)

tagProtect.description: Protected Mode configuration (present only if previously configured)

action.description: Current protection action applied to the tag

password.description: 8-character hexadecimal 32-bit password used for tag protection

tagID.description: Hexadecimal EPC of the protected tag

enableShortRange.description: Whether short-range protection mode is enabled

tagFocus.description: TagFocus configuration (present only if previously configured)

tagQuieting.description: Tag quieting configuration (present only if previously configured)

action.description: Action applied to the specified tags

tagIDs.description: List of hexadecimal EPC strings of affected tags

request_schema.title: Quiet Tags Request
request_schema.description: Request payload for quieting specific tags.

tagIDs.description: List of hexadecimal EPC strings of tags to quiet.

response_example.message: Success: Gen2X configured. Use applyImpinjGen2X flag in start command to apply features.

response_schema.title: Quiet Tags Success Response
response_schema.description: Confirms specified tags were quieted and configuration was staged for application.

message.description: Response status indicating success or failure

examples.message: Success: Gen2X configured. Use applyImpinjGen2X flag in start command to apply features.

request_schema.title: Start IOT Cloud Service Request
request_schema.description: Request payload for starting the IOT cloud service.

applyImpinjGen2X.description: Set true to apply staged Gen2X configuration while starting.

response_schema.title: Start IOT Cloud Service Success Response

request_schema.title: Stop IOT Cloud Service Request
request_schema.description: No request body required. Use PUT /cloud/stop.

response_schema.title: Stop IOT Cloud Service Success Response

request_schema.title: Unquiet Tags Request
request_schema.description: Request payload for restoring previously quieted tags.

tagIDs.description: List of hexadecimal EPC strings of tags to unquiet.

response_example.message: Success: Gen2X configured. Use applyImpinjGen2X flag in start command to apply features.

response_schema.title: Unquiet Tags Success Response
response_schema.description: Confirms specified tags were unquieted and configuration was staged for application.

message.description: Response status indicating success or failure

examples.message: Success: Gen2X configured. Use applyImpinjGen2X flag in start command to apply features.
